name: Mint Pesto
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chopped nuts (Pine nuts are recommended; walnuts are also acceptable)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fresh mint leaves into a food processor or blender.
2. Add salt, garlic, and chopped nuts to the food processor.
3. Turn on the food processor and slowly pour in olive oil.
4. Process until the mixture reaches a consistency that can be spread with a knife.
5. Transfer the pesto to a serving dish.
6. Stir in grated Parmesan cheese.
This Mint Pesto is excellent when spread over broiled salmon or halibut fillets. It can also be served as a simple side dish with pasta, or used to flavor broiled or steamed chicken, seafood, or vegetables for a main course.
